{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Man with emerald horns
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A man with [[emerald]] horns is present in the battle.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
